sections.heading: 1. Functional Description
sections.content: Digital complex sound generator (DCSG) with 3 programmable square wave attenuators and 1 noise generator.

sections.heading: 2. Programming
sections.content: 8-bit parallel data bus with write enable. Address map for frequency and attenuation control registers.

tables.title: Data Format
tables.description: Register address bits vs data bits layout.
